# storage_module_api — vendored

Generated by [`logos-co/logos-storage-module`](https://github.com/logos-co/logos-storage-module)
at rev `321283bb` from `storage_module.rep` via the logos-cpp-sdk QRO generator. Vendored here so
`yolo_board_module` can compile against `StorageModule` without pulling the whole
`logos-storage-module` flake + its `logos-storage-nim?submodules=1` input, which has a
non-reproducible NAR hash across environments (GitHub Actions vs local machines differ).

## Regenerating

```
cd ~/devel/github.com/vpavlin/logos-storage-module  # or a fresh checkout
nix build .#include
cp result/include/storage_module_api.{h,cpp} \
   <this-repo>/module/vendor/storage_module_api/
```

Update when storage_module's API changes (new Q_INVOKABLE methods / events). No code changes
on our side — the generator is deterministic given the .rep file.

Storage module runtime `.lgx` is installed separately by scaffold (`basecamp modules`
resolves it from scaffold defaults or `[basecamp.dependencies]`); nothing here ships a binary.
